content.text:
📊 ETH technical structure: Cautious consolidation

Current levels:
• Price: $1,879 (flat 24h, +0.05%)
• Market sentiment: FEAR (28/100) — recovering from extreme
• Mempool congestion: MEDIUM (~80K unconfirmed)
• Network activity: Steady but not overheated

Key observations:
✅ ETH outperforming MSTR (-6.4%) and COIN (-3.0%)
✅ Holding above $1,850 support despite equity weakness
✅ Fear & Greed recovering from <25 (bullish contrarian signal)

Watch $1,920 resistance — break above with volume opens path to $2,000.

Support: $1,820 | $1,750
Resistance: $1,920 | $2,000

Risk: Equity correlation remains elevated. TSLA -14.5% shows risk-off pressure.

metadata.expected_engagement: Medium-High — levels and analysis get saved/shared
